artifacts.label: Incoming EBR Submission
artifacts.subject: EBR Submission for Review — AT-2026-0142 Atorvastatin Calcium 40mg Tablets
artifacts.body:
Hi Quality team,

Please find attached the executed batch record for AT-2026-0142 (Atorvastatin Calcium 40mg Film-Coated Tablets, 500,000 units, Lilly Indianapolis).

Manufacture dates: 08–11-Mar-2026. All in-process checks completed. One observation noted in Step 7 (blend time) — within acceptable range per SOP-BLN-004 discretion.

Please confirm receipt.

Best,
Sarah Chen
Senior QA Associate, Lilly Indianapolis

logs.title: BOM complete — all 8 materials dispensed within specification
reasoning: Atorvastatin Calcium USP (RM-4021) — MBR: 42.6 kg | EBR: 42.6 kg ✓
Lactose Monohydrate NF (RM-2001) — MBR: 120.0 kg | EBR: 120.0 kg ✓
Microcrystalline Cellulose PH-102 (RM-2018) — MBR: 55.0 kg | EBR: 55.0 kg ✓
Croscarmellose Sodium NF (RM-2031) — MBR: 8.0 kg | EBR: 8.0 kg ✓
Hydroxypropyl Cellulose EF (RM-3011) — MBR: 4.0 kg | EBR: 4.0 kg ✓
Magnesium Stearate NF (RM-2041) — MBR: 2.0 kg | EBR: 2.0 kg ✓
Opadry II White (RM-6021) — MBR: 12.5 kg | EBR: 12.5 kg ✓
Purified Water USP (RM-1001) — Used in granulation, evaporated ✓
All CoAs current ✓ | All suppliers on approved list ✓ | Dispensing yield: 100.0% ✓

logs.title: Manufacturing steps reviewed — 1 OBSERVATION: blend time +1 min, within SOP discretion
reasoning: Steps 1-2 Dispensing/Sieving: All 8 materials at exact MBR quantities ✓ | Env 21°C/38% RH ✓ | Yield 99.8% ✓
Steps 3-5 Pre-Blend, Granulation, Drying: RMG-001 impeller 250 RPM ✓ | Endpoint 17.2 kW (spec 15-20 kW) ✓ | FBD-001 cal exp Jun-2026 ✓ | LOD avg 1.8% (spec NMT 2.0%) ✓
Steps 6-7 Milling/Blending: 20 mesh ✓ | Yield 99.2% ✓ | OBSERVATION: Blend time 18 min vs MBR max 17 min
-> SOP-BLN-004 Sec 3.2: single exceedance NMT 1.5 min, documentation only | IPC blend uniformity RSD 0.8% (spec NMT 1.5%) ✓ — no product impact
Steps 8-9 Compression/Coating: TBP-003 avg weight 467.8 mg ✓ | Hardness 10.1 kP ✓ | Friability 0.18% ✓ | Weight gain 3.2% (spec 3.0-3.5%) ✓
Step 10 Packaging: Reconciliation 99.6% ✓ | All equipment calibrations current ✓ | All operator signatures complete ✓
